No me gustó mucho la atención, estaba esperando mientras un playero apoyado en un auto charlaba con los ocupantes del mismo, tuve que esperar hasta que otro playero me atienda.

I didn't like the service very much; I was waiting while a gas station attendant leaned against a car chatting with the occupants. I had to wait until another attendant helped me.
